meigen-featured-perfume-key-visual-poste.title: Brandads 8 AI Prompt
meigen-featured-perfume-key-visual-poste.prompt:
Generate a 9:16 vertical 'hero fragrance poster'.

Product Information:
Fragrance Name: THE NEW SIGNAL
Scent Family: minimal high-fashion floral woody fragrance
Key Notes: white iris, graphite musk, misted cedar, and silver amber
Mood & Atmosphere: minimal high-fashion campaign mood
Dominant Color: pearl white, graphite, mist blue, and silver

Visual Requirements:
Create a high-end fragrance brand advertisement poster—not a standard product shot or e-commerce detail page—but a luxury olfactory campaign–grade hero image.
Use 9:16 vertical composition. Center the perfume bottle as the hero object: large-scale, centrally placed, with premium glass transparency, an exquisitely crafted cap, realistic reflections, soft highlights, and advertising-grade lighting.
Scent-inspired elements organically orbit the bottle to visualize 'aroma made visible'. These may include petals, citrus rinds, wood shavings, resin droplets, leather swatches, wisps of smoke, water beads, light particles, silk ribbons, or mist—selected thoughtfully per scent family, not overloaded.
Focus is not on deconstructing the bottle, but on expressing aroma, materiality, emotion, and olfactive layering. Elements must convey spatial depth (foreground/midground/background), subtle levitation, and gentle motion—as if fragrance diffuses slowly outward from the bottle.

Typography Guidance:
Include minimal Chinese text—never overwhelming.
Top or upper-middle area:
Main headline: THE NEW SIGNAL
Sub-headline: white iris, graphite musk, misted cedar, and silver amber
Bottom area may feature a short poetic line, e.g.:
'Let every breath feel like dawn’s first light.'
or:
'Let night bloom softly with each inhale.'
Text must evoke premium brand poster sensibility: concise, restrained, generously spaced—never resembling technical specs or e-commerce copy.

Style Requirements:
Luxury fragrance advertising, high-end poster aesthetic, photorealistic texture, cinematic lighting, exquisite glass bottle rendering, scent visualization, strong atmospheric presence, soft depth of field, refined material detail, brand hero visual, 9:16 vertical.

Avoid:
Pure-white e-commerce product backgrounds.
Generic still-life setups.
Chaotic or flying elements.
Excessive floral clutter (e.g., wedding-style overload).
Overly dense text.
Excessive cyberpunk styling.
Cheap plastic质感.
Cluttered or busy backgrounds.
Scent elements overpowering the bottle.
Final output should resemble a premium hero visual suitable for fragrance launch campaigns, social media ads, key visuals (KV), boutique window displays, or olfactory storytelling initiatives.

meigen-featured-creative-collectible-cha.prompt:
Generate a 4:5 vertical, high-fidelity creative character packaging box poster—designed to resemble a premium collectible figurine box, optimized for Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book) cover visuals.

The central subject is an East Asian woman aged 20–26: clearly adult, with a 'sweet-yet-cool' refined facial structure—delicate but natural, neither childlike nor influencer-typical. Her expression balances confidence and a faint, sophisticated smile—conveying both charm and cool detachment. Hair is styled in a voluminous high ponytail, with soft face-framing strands and gently curled ends—evoking K-pop group energy and streetwise trendiness.

Her physique emphasizes natural, harmonious proportions: sculpted shoulder–neck lines, defined yet tasteful bust and waist contours, and elegant leg definition—all achieved through intentional garment tailoring and poised stance. Styling remains fashion-forward, restrained, and elevated—never exaggerated, vulgar, or sexualized.

Outfit: black cropped top + black leather mini-skirt + black short jacket. Top is a fitted sleeveless vest or delicate-strapped crop; jacket is a black leather biker-style short coat, optionally draped casually over one shoulder to amplify the sweet-cool duality. Skirt is high-waisted black leather; paired with black ankle socks and chunky platform boots/shoes. Overall look delivers collectible character appeal—trendy, iconic, and covetable.

The entire composition adopts a 'character packaging box' concept: she stands centered within a transparent blister-pack display area—like a limited-edition fashion figurine. The clear thermoformed plastic shell must be visibly crisp, with authentic surface reflections, sharp highlight edges, and precise body-contouring mold structure surrounding her.

Packaging layout is fully realized: left-side vertical brand info panel, top 'Limited Edition' badge, right-side accessory compartment, bottom 'Outfit Card', barcode, collector number, Style Tag, and character mini-card—all integrated as functional, premium packaging modules. This must read as a real collectible toy/fashion doll box—not a portrait photo.

Right-side accessory compartment is fully detailed, with each item in its own transparent grid cell: black mini shoulder bag, black sunglasses, purple perfume bottle, pink-purple lip gloss, black compact powder case, instant-print photo card / smartphone mini-card, and spare black platform boots/shoes. All accessories are neatly arranged with retail-display precision.

Dominant color scheme: lavender purple + black + silver-white.
